description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and low-profile design. The upholstery is a deep charcoal or black color, appearing smooth and matte, with a subtle, even texture. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which are loose and plush, providing a comfortable seating experience. Four accent pillows in light gray and teal hues are arranged on the seat and back, adding visual contrast and comfort. A light gray throw blanket with a bold black pattern is draped over one armrest and part of the seat. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs, slightly elevating it above the ground.
description: A modern, low-profile black sofa with loose seat and back cushions, accented by light gray and teal pillows and a patterned throw blanket. The design is sleek and boxy, with short block legs and a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight armrest, two accent pillows, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both seat and back cushions, all four accent pillows, and the throw blanket draped over the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the throw blanket's drape, two accent pillows, and the sofa's armrest profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, unadorned backrest and the tops of the accent pillows and throw blanket.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size; four accent pillows of varied colors and a throw blanket are arranged on top.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, fully padded and upholstered in the same fabric as the sofa, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with a simple, unadorned finish and slightly recessed placement.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose back cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns or decorative stitching on the main sofa, but accent pillows and throw blanket add color and pattern contrast.
